extraction.one_line_summary: BISSEGGER won from the breakaway, attacking solo inside final 10km on the technical descent into Gstaad to take stage and KOM jersey.
tactical_patterns: BISSEGGER attacked THOMAS through technical corners on descent rather than climb, exploiting bike handling over pure power.
Early break allowed huge gap as peloton surrendered stage, suggesting GC teams accepted rest day before mountain stages.
Movistar deployed multiple riders to break despite no GC threat, revealing stage-hunting strategy when team leader absent.

rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: positive: Won by attacking on technical descent through corners, showing descending skills complement TT power.
rider_signals.THOMAS Benjamin: neutral: Led over KOM but couldn't match BISSEGGER's descending speed through final corners despite slipstream advantage.
rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: neutral: Identified as local favorite active in break, suggesting home-race motivation pattern for stage hunting.
